case_title: RODGER BORIES VS. PHIL'Z COFFEE, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY BORIES, RODGER (RODGER BORIES DBA COFFEE MAGIC) AS TO DEFENDANT PHIL'Z COFFEE, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-04-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BORIES, RODGER (RODGER BORIES DBA COFFEE MAGIC) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PHIL'Z COFFEE, INC. $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,605.00, PLAINTIFF PRESENT AT HEARING DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. MOTION TO CONTINUE DENIED-NOT TIMELY,AND INADEQUATE SUBSTANTIATION. MATTER HEARD BEFORE COMM. PAUL SLAVIT, CLERK SHAWNA VANTREE. CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT, IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. JUDGE PRO TEM: PHILLIP HWEE. CLERK: S. VAMTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BORIES, RODGER (RODGER BORIES DBA COFFEE MAGIC) IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PHIL'Z COFFEE, INC. ALTHOUGH THE COURT DOES NOT AWARD MONEY DAMAGES, THE COURT ORDERS DEFENDANTS TO RETURN ALL EQUIPMENT REMAINING IN HIS POSSESSION - INCLUDING CUP-AT-A-TIME STANDS - TO BE RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF WITHIN FIVE (5) DAYS AFTER THIS JUDGMENT BECOMES FINAL.
